energy_dependency_notes: Large cooling demand swings during heatwaves and high regional grid sensitivity.
climate_vulnerability_notes: Monsoon variability, heatwaves, and regional drought conditions can affect crops and power demand.

energy_dependency_notes: Heatwaves can increase cooling demand and affect thermal generation constraints.
climate_vulnerability_notes: Summer heat and soil moisture deficits can pressure agriculture and energy operations.

energy_dependency_notes: Hydropower variability and demand pressure can create operational sensitivity.
climate_vulnerability_notes: Rainfall deficits can affect crop stress, water availability, and hydro-linked energy pressure.
